steps: Log in or create an OpenAI account at https://platform.openai.com/signup
Enter a name for the key (optional)
Select a project (or use the default project)
Copy the key immediately — it will not be shown again

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: API Key
credential_fields.description: Your OpenAI secret API key, used as a Bearer token in the Authorization header

notes: New accounts receive a small free credit for testing
Paid usage is billed per token — check https://openai.com/pricing for current rates
The key is shown only once at creation — store it securely
API keys can be scoped to specific projects for better access control
Rate limits vary by tier — check your usage limits at https://platform.openai.com/account/limits

test_endpoint.description: List all available models to verify the API key is valid
